name: codex-ollama-proxy
description: Compatibility proxy for using Ollama, OpenRouter and custom Responses API providers with Codex plugins, MCP tools, tool_search and apply_patch.
author: bharat2808

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/proxy.js && node --check src/route-config-schema.js && node --check src/imagine.js && node --check src/codex-config.js && node --check src/codex-app-server-skills.js && node --check src/skill-find.js && node --check src/skill-index.js && node --check src/presets.js && node --check src/imagine-config.js && node --check adaptor/completion-api-adaptor.js
